description: 语义枚举定义，面向开发者；数值对应 API 请求参数，Description 对应 UI 展示文本

enums.name: GameMode
enums.description: 游戏模式（天选/匹配/天人 × 单双三排），值对应 /api/record/mini-program/stats 的 gameMode 参数

enums.name: GameModeCategory
enums.description: 模式大类（排位/匹配/娱乐/天人），不区分队伍人数。注：娱乐模式当前 API 无独立 gameMode ID，仅前端分类使用

GameMode.name: GetCategory
GameMode.description: 获取 GameMode 对应的大类（天选/匹配/天人）
GameMode.body: return value switch { GameMode.RankSolo or GameMode.RankDuo or GameMode.RankTrio => GameModeCategory.Rank, GameMode.MatchSolo or GameMode.MatchDuo or GameMode.MatchTrio => GameModeCategory.Match, GameMode.TianrenSolo or GameMode.TianrenDuo or GameMode.TianrenTrio => GameModeCategory.Tianren, _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(value)) };

GameMode.name: GetTeamSize
GameMode.description: 获取 GameMode 对应的队伍人数（单排/双排/三排）
GameMode.body: return value switch { GameMode.RankSolo or GameMode.MatchSolo or GameMode.TianrenSolo => TeamSize.Solo, GameMode.RankDuo or GameMode.MatchDuo or GameMode.TianrenDuo => TeamSize.Duo, GameMode.RankTrio or GameMode.MatchTrio or GameMode.TianrenTrio => TeamSize.Trio, _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(value)) };

GameMode.name: FromCategoryAndTeamSize

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: 模式大类：天选/匹配/天人

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: 队伍人数：单排/双排/三排

GameMode.description: 通过模式大类与队伍人数组合为具体的 GameMode 枚举值
GameMode.returns: 组合后的 GameMode 枚举值，如 RankTrio、MatchSolo 等
GameMode.body: return (category, size) switch { (GameModeCategory.Rank, TeamSize.Solo) => GameMode.RankSolo, (GameModeCategory.Rank, TeamSize.Duo) => GameMode.RankDuo, (GameModeCategory.Rank, TeamSize.Trio) => GameMode.RankTrio, (GameModeCategory.Match, TeamSize.Solo) => GameMode.MatchSolo, (GameModeCategory.Match, TeamSize.Duo) => GameMode.MatchDuo, (GameModeCategory.Match, TeamSize.Trio) => GameMode.MatchTrio, (GameModeCategory.Tianren, TeamSize.Solo) => GameMode.TianrenSolo, (GameModeCategory.Tianren, TeamSize.Duo) => GameMode.TianrenDuo, (GameModeCategory.Tianren, TeamSize.Trio) => GameMode.TianrenTrio, _ => throw new ArgumentException($"未知组合: {category} + {size}") };
